IDirectMusicAudioPath8

The IDirectMusicAudioPath8 interface has the following methods:

Sound management Activate
  SetPitch
  SetVolume
Information GetObjectInPath

The IDirectMusicAudioPath8 interface also supports the AddRef and Release methods. There is also minimal support for the QueryInterface method.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in dmusici.h.
